name: /compliance-add: when --paywalled is set, requires non-empty --document-url and --attribution-note (§2.19 paywalled handling)
command:
mkdir -p .claude-tdd-pro && printf '' > .claude-tdd-pro/COMPLIANCE-URLS.yaml && printf 'Authoritative.
Industry.
Paywalled.
' > why.txt && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/compliance-add.sh" https://www.iso.org/standard/x.html --id iso-27017 --catalog "$PWD/.claude-tdd-pro/COMPLIANCE-URLS.yaml" --why-authoritative-file "$PWD/why.txt" --paywalled
